_comment: Synthetic Tavily topic='news' results for momentum() (design.md §5). Dates are real RFC 1123 strings (verified via `new Date(iso).toUTCString()`, matching the live-verified Tavily format), pinned against endDate below. Mix: 2 recent, 2 prior, 1 out-of-window entirely (>180d before endDate -- must be excluded from both buckets AND from the undated count), 2 undated (no published_date), 1 unparseable (garbage string, must also count as undated).

results.title: Old funding note, outside the 180d window entirely
Funding round, publish date not returned by the search API

expected.note: recent+prior=4 (>=3, past the thin-signal threshold); ratio = 2/max(2,1) = 1, strictly between 0.67 and 1.5 -> 'stable'. undated(3) < recent+prior(4), so undatedMajority is false here -- see the fixtures README for an undated-majority variant built by removing a4 and a3 from a copy of this fixture.
